policy_bottlenecks.interpretation: The calibrated direction distribution and the separate action-value heads jointly made every policy action ineligible. Removing gates would not repair the negative top-500 routing evidence.

feature_importance_observation.interpretation: The conditional direction head allocated more normalized gain to deterministic cyclical features than to observed order flow, consistent with weak cross-day stability. This is diagnostic evidence, not proof of causation.

rejected_responses: Do not lower probability, agreement, drawdown, lower-tail, minimum-trade, or positive-day gates to manufacture activity.
Do not promote either positive top-100 routing result; both are post-hoc calibration diagnostics and fail materially by top 500.
Do not apply leverage because no broad after-cost ranked tail or executable edge was established.
Do not open policy, development, distant-confirmation, or untouched dates after the calibration architecture rejection.
Do not claim that opportunity AUC alone identifies the profitable action.

next_hypothesis.rationale: Train one mirror-equivariant multiclass head directly on the economically optimal after-cost action: long, abstain, or short. Weight boundedly by decision-regret span so economically consequential mistakes matter while retaining average-label-uniqueness weights. Calibrate with one positive temperature and one abstain-logit bias shared symmetrically by long and short. Retain the shared conditional magnitude and tail heads, unchanged risk profiles, and nested chronological gates.

research_basis.title: Trading via Selective Classification
research_basis.use: Supports an explicit ternary action space with abstention under walk-forward evaluation.

research_basis.title: Utility-Weighted Forecasting and Calibration for Risk-Adjusted Decisions under Trading Frictions
research_basis.use: Supports aligning forecast training and calibration with bounded decision loss under explicit frictions; its empirical results are not imported.

research_basis.title: Price predictability in limit order book with deep learning model
research_basis.use: Supports separating volatility or opportunity prediction from direction and emphasizes volume imbalance for directional information.

research_basis.title: Exploring Microstructural Dynamics in Cryptocurrency Limit Order Books: Better Inputs Matter More Than Stacking Another Hidden Layer
research_basis.use: Supports testing economically meaningful inputs and ternary labels before adding model complexity; its Bybit results do not validate this Binance model.
